customPrinting.title: Design Your Personalized Gift
customPrinting.subtitle: Add your photo and text, and see the live preview instantly
customPrinting.uploadHint: PNG or JPG — up to 5 MB
customPrinting.textPlaceholder: Write a name or a phrase...
customPrinting.attachNote: On mobile your photo is sent with the order directly. On desktop, attach it inside the WhatsApp chat after sending the order.
customPrinting.aiPromptPlaceholder: Describe your design... e.g. a cute lion with sunglasses
customPrinting.aiHint: Each prompt creates a brand-new design.
customPrinting.aiNotConfigured: The AI design generator isn't set up yet.
customPrinting.aiError: Couldn't generate the design, please try again.

studio.pick: Pick a product and start designing
studio.selectHint: Select an element to edit it
studio.lowRes: Low image resolution — it may look blurry when printed.

ai.title: Unsure what to give? Let AI help
